description_long: This is a large commercial cargo airplane painted in the FedEx livery, featuring a predominantly white fuselage with bold purple and orange branding. The aircraft has a streamlined, cylindrical body with a pointed nose and a cockpit located at the front, characterized by multiple cockpit windows. Its wings are low-mounted and swept back, each equipped with large jet engines beneath them, and a third engine is integrated at the base of the vertical stabilizer. The tail section is a T-tail configuration, with a prominent vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer mounted high. The landing gear is not visible in these images, suggesting it is likely retractable. The overall design is optimized for high-speed, long-distance cargo transport.
description: A large FedEx cargo airplane with a white fuselage, purple tail, and swept low-mounted wings, featuring three jet engines and a T-tail configuration.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full FedEx branding, low-mounted swept wings, and the three-engine configuration with the tail engine visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the T-tail, the central tail engine, and the full span of the swept wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with FedEx branding, showing the wing and engine arrangement from the other profile.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pointed nose, cockpit windows, and the symmetrical placement of the two underwing engines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with no visible winglets and a slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Three jet engines: two underwing and one tail-mounted.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
